en.extract:
The fire-fronted bishop (Euplectes diadematus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is found in Kenya, Somalia, and Tanzania.

The '''fire-fronted bishop''' ('''''Euplectes diadematus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is found in [[Kenya]], [[Somalia]], and [[Tanzania]].
